hypothesis: If an LLM-based extractor is prompted one-shot with the most complex in-context example using o4‑mini, then it will achieve a higher collection rate and higher structural and parametric precision, recall, and F1 for extracting PROV‑DM-compliant synthesis provenance graphs from materials synthesis papers than zero-shot prompting and than GPT‑4.1 and GPT‑4.1 mini, because the complex example provides task-specific guidance that improves identification of entities, activities, edges, and attributes.
